title: gentianella germanica subsp. rhaetica
intro: Gentianella germanica subsp. rhaetica, also known as Alpine gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gentianella germanica subsp. rhaetica include its ability to aid in digestion, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues and colds.
